# webViewIsStatusBarVisible(_:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the status bar in a web view’s window is visible.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func webViewIsStatusBarVisible(_ sender: WebView!) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The web view that sent the message.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if a web view’s status bar (if any) is visible; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

If you do not implement this method, it returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] by default.

## Managing Toolbars and the Status Bar

- **webViewAreToolbarsVisible(_:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether any toolbars are visible in a web view’s window.
- **webView(_:setToolbarsVisible:)**: Sets whether a web view’s toolbars should be visible.
- **webView(_:setStatusBarVisible:)**: Sets the visibility of the status bar in a web view’s window.
